chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 2128 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 17.04.2025. Mr. Shehriyar Imdad Awan, AAG. ***************** On 07.12.2023 following order was passed. “ No one is in attendance and no intimation has been received. Be that as it may, by way of indulgence, the matter is adjourned but with note of caution that if such absence persists on the next date, the petition will be liable to be dismissed. Adjourned to a date in office.” After the said order no efforts have been taken by the petitioner or his counsel to proceed with the matter even today none appeared nor any intimation received which reflects that they have lost interest in the matter. Accordingly instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
